items.title: Score up to 44% Prime Day savings on a massive lineup of LEGO sets – Star Wars, Technic, Botanicals, City, more all from $8
items.summary: As part of the ongoing Amazon Prime Day Sale, you can find LEGO sets getting up to 44% discounts right now across a wide variety of themes. There’s something for everybody during this event, like the Star Wars Imperial Star Destroyer at a new low price of $111.99 shipped, down from $160, which is a great way to round out collections/displays far, far away. Of course, you can find plenty more options, like the Technic Peugeot 9X8 24H Le Mans Hybrid Hypercar for $139.99 shipped, landing just $3 above its all-time low. These and much more are waiting for you below (with the bestselling sets on sale available here), so dive on in and happy building!

items.title: Segway’s Navimow Prime Day Sale drops the premium X430 + X450 Robotic Lawn Mowers to new lows starting from $2,099, more
items.summary: Coinciding with the full momentum of Amazon’s Prime Day Sale, Segway has launched its parallel Navimow Prime Day Sale that is giving us the best prices this year on new and legacy robot mowers. Of course, for me, the biggest inclusion is the new X430 Robotic Lawn Mower down at $2,099 shipped, matching the price over at Amazon. This new model goes for $2,499 at full price, which we formerly saw discounted as low as $2,299 since hitting the market back in March. Lately, we’ve only seen free bundled gear, but during this sale (which is lasting into July) you’re able to score a larger-than-ever $400 markdown for the best new price we have tracked. You can get my hands-on take in my review of it here, as well as browse all the other deals below.

items.title: Segway increases Prime Day savings on EVs up to 58% off, like the all-terrain ZT3 Pro e-scooter at $800 + more from $220
items.summary: Running parallel to Amazon’s Prime Day Sale event, Segway has launched its expanded Prime Day deals with up to 58% discounts on EVs. One model that saw a greater price cut from the pre-sale deals is Segway’s ZT3 Pro All-Terrain Electric Scooter down at $799.99 shipped, matching the price we’re seeing over at Amazon. Despite carrying a direct $1,300 MSRP, you can often find it going for $1,000 at most these days, with discounts having mostly dropped the price to $850 in 2026. While it did drop down to $773 a single time in January, you’re otherwise looking at the best price we have tracked with the $200 savings here ($500 off the MSRP). Head below to check out the full lineup of deals while they last – especially the amazing new extra battery bundle and low prices we’re seeing on the brand’s e-bikes.

items.title: This 6-in-1 Travel Adapter with built-in USB-C cable has you covered in ‘over 200 countries’ down at $25 low for Prime Day (50% off)
items.summary:
Baseus 70W Travel Adapter with Retractable USB-C Cable

Buy for $25 (Reg. $50)

Apply FJ32XZTR during checkout. Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

This Baseus travel adapter has become a main part of my travel kit, and it’s been a solid addition. It supports Type C, A, G, and I plug types for use across more than 200 countries, and you also get an AC outlet, two USB-A ports, and an extra USB-C port alongside a built-in cable, so charging your phone, laptop, and other gear is much easier without packing a bunch of separate adapters.

This is one of the thinnest 5,000mAh MagSafe power banks I’ve used, and it has earned a spot in my EDC just for that. It’s a 15W Qi2-certified model, and it comes in at just 0.3 inches in thickness.
